name: Shottr
description: Screenshot tool optimized for UI/UX designers — pixel-perfect scrolling capture, OCR, measurements

extraction.notes: Uses Sparkle 2 with appcast hosted on shottr.cc.

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Free with paid extras (one-time purchase unlocks pro features). Well-structured Sparkle 2 appcast. Download filename pattern: 'Shottr-{version}.dmg'. The appcast feed is clean and standard, making version tracking straightforward. The pro license is a one-time purchase that unlocks advanced features like scrolling capture, OCR, and measurements.
